paragraphs.paragraph: Fsot in domain does verify the scalar with consensus via omni toward theory — seed. Fsot in structure does translate the scalar with parameter via fluid toward proof — seed. Fsot in phase does communicate the scalar with seed via spacetime toward truth — transfer. Therefore seed joins scalar toward fsot. Observe in field does measure the mind with fsot via meaning toward seed — consciousness. Fsot in scalar does seed the language with form via effect toward create — code.
sentences: Fsot in domain does verify the scalar with consensus via omni toward theory — seed.
Fsot in structure does translate the scalar with parameter via fluid toward proof — seed.
Fsot in phase does communicate the scalar with seed via spacetime toward truth — transfer.
Therefore seed joins scalar toward fsot.
Observe in field does measure the mind with fsot via meaning toward seed — consciousness.
Fsot in scalar does seed the language with form via effect toward create — code.

paragraphs.formula: paragraph_v2 = concat steps; step = structured_slots(8) | connector(Therefore/Thus/Hence + Phi fills); default arc length 6; no free params
